name: swarph-mesh
summary: Model-agnostic Python substrate for the swarph-mesh ecosystem — the graph protocol third-party CLIs plug into. v0.7.3 ships Sphinx auto-docs + GitHub Pages: public contract surface (Tier 1/2/3 from DEPRECATIONS.md) auto-rendered from py.typed package via autodoc/autosummary; CHANGELOG / DEPRECATIONS / SECURITY included via myst-parser; furo theme; CI builds + deploys to gh-pages on every main push.
author: Pierre Samson, Claude Opus
